title: JRose Collections Kids Mega Lucky Bag 3 Pack Set – Football, Jungle & Space Bags with 8 Surprises Each – Toys, Games, Crafts, Stickers & Activity Sheets – Party Bag Fillers & Fun Activities
features: 🎉 3 Pack Mega Lucky Bag Bundle – Includes Football, Jungle & Space themes, each bursting with fun toys, stickers, puzzles, and crafts.
🧩 8 Surprises in Every Bag – Each pack is filled with activity sheets, toys, stickers, and games for hours of fun and learning.
✏️ Free Activity Sheets – Each bag comes with themed puzzles, colouring pages, word searches, mazes, or matching games that keep kids learning while they play.
🧸 Perfect for Kids Ages 3+ – Great as party bag fillers, classroom rewards, travel activities, or surprise treats to keep little ones entertained.
✅ Safe & UKCA/CE Certified – All contents meet UK safety standards; not suitable for children under 3 years.
description: Product description Score, explore, and blast off with this 3 Pack Kids Mega Lucky Bag Set, featuring Football, Jungle & Space themes. Each colourful bag is packed with 8 fun surprises, including toys, stickers, activity sheets, puzzles, and crafts to keep kids entertained. Every bag also contains a free themed activity sheet, with creative challenges such as mazes, word searches, tracing, and colouring. Perfect for both fun and learning, these activities keep children engaged while encouraging imagination and problem-solving. Great for party bag fillers, classroom prizes, travel fun, or surprise treats, this Mega Lucky Bag set ensures endless excitement for kids. ⚠️ Safety Warning: Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts. Use under adult supervision. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. Small parts – choking hazard. Use under adult supervision.
